mapper.select: SELECT * FROM drama_episodes WHERE drama_id = #{dramaId} ORDER BY episode_num ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO drama_episodes (drama_id, episode_num, title, video_id, video_url, duration) VALUES (#{dramaId}, #{episodeNum}, #{title}, #{videoId}, #{videoUrl}, #{duration})
mapper.update: UPDATE drama_episodes SET drama_id = #{dramaId}, episode_num = #{episodeNum}, title = #{title}, video_id = #{videoId}, video_url = #{videoUrl}, duration = #{duration}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
